response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, embedded-like systems)
Active contributor to open-source and developer tooling with solid testing practices
concerns: No C or embedded firmware development experience as required
No knowledge of LAN-switch security protocols or embedded networking
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel or network security tech exposure
